title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0965
summary: 1 This case is here on review of a modified affirmance by the Court of Appeals of an order by the District Court summarily committing the petitioner for criminal contempt. 2 The proceeding grew out of the trial of one Peckham for abortion under D.C.Code 1951, § 22—201, 31 Stat.
